scriptLines:
query: 'SELECT
    f.fecha,
    YEAR(f.fecha) AS anio,
    MONTH(f.fecha) AS mes,
    DATENAME(MONTH, f.fecha) AS nombre_mes,
    DATEPART(QUARTER, f.fecha) AS trimestre,
    DAY(f.fecha) AS dia,
    DATENAME(WEEKDAY, f.fecha) AS dia_semana,
    CASE WHEN DATEPART(WEEKDAY, f.fecha) IN (1,7) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS es_fin_de_semana
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT fecha_parto AS fecha FROM silver.bja_partos WHERE fecha_parto IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT DISTINCT fecha_control FROM silver.bja_controles_prenatales WHERE fecha_control IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT DISTINCT fecha_control FROM silver.bja_controles_pediatricos WHERE fecha_control IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT DISTINCT fecha_pago FROM silver.bja_pagos WHERE fecha_pago IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT DISTINCT fecha_inscripcion FROM silver.bja_inscripciones WHERE fecha_inscripcion IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT DISTINCT fecha_inscripcion FROM silver.sup_inscripciones WHERE fecha_inscripcion IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT DISTINCT fecha_control FROM silver.sup_controles WHERE fecha_control IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT DISTINCT fecha_emision FROM silver.sup_boletas WHERE fecha_emision IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT DISTINCT fecha_entrega FROM silver.sup_entregas WHERE fecha_entrega IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT DISTINCT fecha_proxima_entrega FROM silver.sup_entregas WHERE fecha_proxima_entrega IS NOT NULL
) f',
